books.title: Harry Potter
books.description: Harry Potter is a young wizard who discovers his magical heritage and attends Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry where he faces many adventures.
books.image: harry potter and the philosopher's stone.jpg

books.title: A Quest of Heroes
books.description: A Quest of Heroes is an epic coming-of-age fantasy following 14-year-old Thorgrin. Outcast by his family, he defies his father to join the King’s Legion, discovers mysterious magical powers, and gets entangled in forbidden romance and political intrigue.
